subcategory: WebGL shader animation, hero background effect
use_cases: Animated hero section background for landing pages
Dynamic visual effect for hero sections in SaaS applications
Decorative animated background for marketing sites
Interactive visual element for brand presentations
ai_summary: A WebGL shader animation component using Three.js that renders animated line patterns via custom GLSL shaders. Features continuous time-based animation with resolution awareness, creating dynamic gradient-like visual effects. Suitable for hero sections and landing page backgrounds to add visual engagement and modern aesthetics.
